meta.title: Valanto – Real estate software from Switzerland
meta.description: Value, market, manage – finally in one tool. Built in Switzerland.

hero.h1: Value, market, manage – finally in one tool.
hero.lead: You know the drill: one tool for the valuation, another for the marketing – and you keep the same data in both. Valanto brings it all together: properties, valuations with dossier and marketing in one place. Built from Swiss real-estate practice.
hero.coverAlt: Cover page of a Valanto market value appraisal showing the property address and the assessed market value
hero.trust: No credit card required · 1 free valuation · Data privacy compliant (Swiss FADP)

trust.line: Born from Swiss real-estate practice – for brokers, valuers and property managers.

features.h2: One tool for your entire working day
features.intro: Instead of three programs and duplicate data entry: with Valanto you work end to end in one place – from the first valuation to finished marketing.

items.d: All your properties in one place – each with a complete dossier. You'll find everything again when you need it.
Create traceable valuations and export them as a clean dossier – ready for your clients.
Set up projects, manage units and keep an eye on the sales status at any time.
A dedicated marketing page for every property – with no second tool at all.
A dedicated, transparent access for your sellers and partners.
Contacts and prospects in one place – soon directly in Valanto. (in development)

items.text: Manage, market, steer projects – without constantly switching programs.
Traceable valuations with a professional dossier. Quickly created, cleanly exported.
You do both? Then with Valanto you have everything on one continuous platform – with all modules.

pricing.intro: Cancel monthly, no hidden costs. And you create your first valuation for free.
pricing.note: All prices excl. VAT · Custom solutions for teams on request.

plans.name: SPECIALIST
features: For those who value and market

siv.text: Valanto grows out of the daily work of valuation and the exchange with the Swiss valuers' association SIV. That keeps the platform close to what you really need in practice – rather than what off-the-shelf software offers.

points.d: We handle your data in accordance with Swiss data protection law.
By real estate professionals, for real estate professionals.

cta.h2: Try it out at your own pace.
cta.text: Create your first valuation for free – or let us show you Valanto in a personal demo.

footer.claim: Value, market, manage – in one tool.
footer.copy: © 2026 Valanto / Felsberg Consulting GmbH. All rights reserved.

cookies.text: We use cookies to analyse website usage.
